items.text: Begin the Kriar Interlude after Act 4
Kriar Village: defeat Lythara, the Wayward Spear
Howling Caves: defeat The Abominable Yeti
Glacial Tarn: defeat Rakkar, the Frozen Talon
Etched Ravine: defeat Stormgore, the Guardian
The Cuachic Vault: defeat Zelina, Blood Priestess & Zolin, Blood Priest
Kriar Village: Lythara, the Wayward Spear → +40 Maximum Spirit
Finish the campaign → enter the endgame (Atlas / first Waystone map)
